content.en:
The Extreme of Silver.

The White Armor Realm Lord and many other Fourth Realms were extremely puzzled.

"Bai Kai, why hasn't that one come out yet?"

A Fourth Realm asked in confusion.

It stands to reason that in the cave deep in the vein of the Silver Mountain, the erosion power is too terrifying, even if it is the fourth day pass, it will not last long.

But now that dozens of extradimensional epochs have passed, and the other party is still cultivating there, this is not a matter of the foundation being damaged and unable to break through, but a matter of whether it has fallen or not!

After cultivating for such a long time, there is a high probability that it will fall, and even if it comes out now, it will be almost impossible to heal the injury.

Is that stupid?

"Will it fall?"

Another Fourth Realm asked.

"It shouldn't fall, maybe the other party has a way to resist that corrosive force, so you can hold on longer!"

The White Armor Realm Lord guessed.

But with the passage of time, five hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

Ye Tian is still in retreat and penance there, and he has not yet come out.

The White Armor Realm Lord didn't believe that Ye Tian was still alive, but he didn't dare to venture in.

But in fact, Ye Tian did fall several times, but he condensed and copied his body again and again, so that he could continue to practice there.

"Three thousand extra-dimensional rule realms!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited at the moment.

Although the improvement efficiency is much slower now, as long as you continue to comprehend thousands of extradimensional eras, you can definitely raise the realm of extradimensional rules to the realm of five thousand realms.

But after five thousand realms, if he wants to continue to improve, it will be much slower, and he needs a better treasure land or a better treasure to quickly improve the realm of extradimensional rules.

In this way, it was the time of the non-extradimensional era again.

At this time.

Ye Tian's super-dimensional rule realm reached three thousand five hundred.

And there has been great progress in other aspects, such as the ten-dimensional celestial body, which has now cultivated to the second level of the Dacheng realm.

As for the Wumu Body, with the help of resources such as the massive Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Essence, it had reached the limit of the second layer of Dacheng.

But Ye Tian didn't dare to raise it to the third layer realm, because once it was promoted to the third layer realm, the third black secret method of the second layer Dacheng limit was afraid that it was a little insufficient, even if he could continue to suppress and reject, but he could not let him burst out with all his strength.

If his strength can't burst out with all his strength, then what's the point of him breaking through this realm?

"Where is the third layer of the Sanwu Secret Method?"

Ye Tian was quite distressed.

It's not that he hasn't thought about creating his own, but his realm is still too low, and his knowledge is too shallow, and it is difficult for him to create the third layer of the Sanwu Secret Method.

If it was so easy to create by itself, there would have been countless fourth realms and even fifth realms to create by themselves.

"Hey, this guy from the Extinction Realm Lord is back!"

Territory of four thousand five hundred.

Ye Tian met the Extinction Realm Lord in a city, and the other party's aura had now become a little stronger.

"Extinction Realm Lord, congratulations on cultivating the second innate multi-dimensional Dao body!"

Ye Tian congratulated.

"It's still thanks to Ye Tianjing's guidance, otherwise I wouldn't have been able to pass the test. The Extinction Realm Lord said.

After talking to the Extinction Realm Lord, Ye Tian knew that the Extinction Realm Lord was not the body of the cultivated Wumu, but another innate multi-dimensional Dao body, the body of the Silver Sand.

And the Extinction Realm Lord also practiced the first layer of the Three Black Secret Method, but did not obtain the second layer.

"Extinction Realm Lord, do you know where you have the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method?"

"This, I really know!" "Although I was not born from the last multi-dimensional tribulation, I know a lot of information, and I also know a lot of the strength of the Fourth Realm. Those forces definitely possess the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method. "

"Now, it can be determined that the forces that have the third layer inheritance of the Three Black Secret Methods include the Great Thousand Feather Sect, the Jiaye Buddha Sect, the Supreme Green Sect, the Longjia Clan, the Blood Lake Clan, and some other overlord-level superdimensional forces. "

Ye Tian smiled bitterly: "These are all overlord-level super-dimensional forces, it is almost impossible to obtain the third layer of the Three Black Secret Methods from them!"

"It's really impossible, the third layer of the Three Black Secret Technique is too important, once obtained, it is enough to cultivate the three top innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies to the limit of the third layer, and without any problems, you can even barely cultivate one of the innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies to the fourth layer. Such a fourth realm is undoubtedly too powerful. The Extinction Realm Lord said enviously.

Just when Ye Tian was disappointed, the Extinction Realm Lord said again: "However, I also know a method that can obtain the third-layer inheritance of the Three Black Secret Method, and the probability is still quite high. "

"What's the solution?"

Ye Tian was full of anticipation.

"The main battlefield of the Multidimensional Tribulation - the Celestial Spider Battlefield!" "That battlefield is one of the main battlefields of the last Multidimensional Tribulation, there have been too many Fourth Realms there, as far as I know, there are several Fourth Realms with the third layer of the Three Black Secret Law Inheritance that have fallen there, and their bones have not yet been found, if they are found, maybe they can find the third layer of the Three Black Secret Law from their bones!"

"'The Celestial Spider Battlefield must be dangerous, otherwise we would have gone to find it. Ye Tian guessed.

"It's really dangerous, it's full of terrible tribulations, as well as the power of thunder and fire, you must know that the power of each multi-dimensional tribulation is different, the last one is the wind calamity, the last one is the thunder, and the last one is the fire. How many multi-dimensional tribulation battles have broken out on that battlefield, and I don't know how much multi-dimensional tribulation power exists, and now even if the fourth day pass or even the fifth day pass powerhouse enters, there is a high probability of falling. "

"In addition, the fifth realm is not daring to enter, and if the fifth realm dares to enter, it is said that it will cause a terrible calamity. Even during the Multidimensional Tribulation, the Fifth Realm only dared to protect the creatures under its command, and definitely did not dare to take the initiative to participate in the Great Tribulation, otherwise the Fifth Realm might fall. Every time there is a multi-dimensional tribulation, there will be a fall of the fifth realm, and I can't help but be tempted to join the war. "

"It is precisely because the Heavenly Spider Battlefield is extremely dangerous, and I don't know how much time it will take to find (Mano) to those fallen Fourth Realms, and where to enter the Fourth Realm. But if you really go in and keep looking for it, as long as you don't fall, you will definitely find it. "

The Lord of the Extinction Realm had the idea of going in at this moment.

He is the strength of the fourth day pass, if he cultivates for a period of time, he will definitely have the combat power of the fifth day pass, and at that time, with his hole cards and means, the chance of survival is there, anyway, it is not worse than the life-saving ability of the sixth day pass.

"Extinction Realm Lord, thank you for reminding me, this is the inheritance of the second layer of the Three Black Secret Method, give it to you!"

Ye Tian passed on the second layer of the Three Black Secret Methods to the Extinction Realm Lord.

The Extinction Realm Lord was overjoyed, and hurriedly thanked: "Thank you Ye Tian Realm Lord, if you need help with anything in the future, just look for me." "

Then, Ye Tian inquired in detail about the information of the Heavenly Spider Battlefield, and the Extinction Realm Lord said it all, and there was no omission at all, so that Ye Tian had a deep understanding of the Heavenly Spider Battlefield.
